primaryUse: Full-stack product engineering, React/TypeScript stack judgment, developer tooling, and startup pragmatism.

reusePolicy.summary: Use public videos, posts, and licensed repositories as source anchors.
reusePolicy.codeReuse: MIT-licensed repositories can be reused according to their licenses.
reusePolicy.transcripts: Use public captions or transcripts for summary with attribution only.
